creator: zachary.crownover@gmail.com
text: Thank you for taking the time and effort update the port as well as test it on multiple versions of poudriere. I looked at the patch and it looks good, with the exception of I'd like to remain the maintainer if it's alright with you. I'm sorry, things got a bit busy on my end and I lost track of some things on the side like this, but I'll work to track it better in the future.
